plan_name: Kilkenny City and County Development Plan 2021-2027 (Volume 1, County)
ribbon_development_rule: 4 houses on any one side of a given 250 m of road frontage
residential_density_dph: rural settlements up to 10 dwellings per hectare; otherwise responds to settlement character
site_coverage_pct: 65% normal; up to 85% in urban areas
separation_distance_m: 22 m between two-storey dwellings / opposing upper-floor windows; 7.5 m rear setback in backland
private_open_space: 25 m² consolidated usable private open space per unit
public_open_space_pct: not below 10% of site area; 25+ units min 0.25 ha; 10 m² playable space per unit
trigger_AA: screened for any plan/project not connected to Natura 2000 management; AA where likely significant effect not excludable (Habitats Directive Art 6(3)/6(4))
trigger_FRA: Strategic FRA done; site-specific FRA per 2009 Guidelines; Plan-Making Justification Test
trigger_AHIA: works affecting protected structures, curtilage and ACAs (§9.3)
notes: Car-parking standards in Chapter 12 (§12.12), not transcribed. Rural one-off-house siting in Chapter 7 (County Kilkenny Rural Design Guide); no fixed minimum site area in Chapter 13. Vehicular entrance max 3 m or 50% of front boundary; hardstanding 2.5 m x 5 m. Sightlines per DMRB. Wetland >0.1 ha drainage needs permission.
